title: Nami Steals the Going Merry Away
description: On pages 5–8, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What do you mean what? It's just business! After all, I am a thief specializing in stealing from pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I never recall agreeing to be one of your shipmates, I only said we were joining hands!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This ship is no exception.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh, but your treasures are an exception!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It was a short while being with Luffyy and the others,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But it was a lot of fun...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well, see ya then!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Tell the others that if we're truly linked by fate, we'll meet again!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: W-Wait a minute, sis!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We were asked to keep a watch on that ship! You're putting us in a lot of trouble here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And give back our treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghh! What is it this time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: After saying that, she ran away!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Damn that woman! Just because she was acting all nice recently, I let my guard down for one moment and then this happens!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare she pull a fast one over us, especially during this crisis!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Wait! I can still see our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the going merry!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Yosaku! Johnny! Where's your ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, we still have ours.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZORO! Usopp!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: just let her go. No good will come of chasing after that thief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: B-But she took our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That ship's important!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I want her to be our Navigator,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: No matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Fine.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...why'd I have to follow such a troublesome captain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, usop! We're going!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: R-Right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: brother Zoro! We're ready to set sail!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
